---
title: "data_collection"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-01"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(terra)
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(rerddap)
library(plotdap)
library(broom)
library(fuzzyjoin)
library(tidync)
library(arrow)
library(sf)
library(car)
library(lme4)
library(MuMIn)
library(ggeffects)
```


# Chlorophyll Data
```{r}
chlor_list <- list()
years <- 2004:2021
for (y in years) {
  print(y)
  start_date <- paste0(y, "-01-01")
  end_date <- paste0(y, "-12-31")
  test1 <- griddap(
    'erdMH1chla1day',
    time = c(start_date, end_date),
    latitude = c(18, 24),
    longitude = c(-110, -104),
    fields = 'chlorophyll'
  )
  test1 <- test1$data
  test1 <- test1 %>% rename(chlor_a = chlorophyll) %>%
    mutate(date=as.Date(time))
  chlor_list[[as.character(y)]] <- test1
  
  Sys.sleep(5)
}

chlor_master <- bind_rows(chlor_list)
chlor_master <- chlor_master %>% 
  mutate(date = as.Date(time)) %>%
  select(-time)


# 2004 - 2021
chlor_master <- read_parquet('chlor_master.parquet')
chlor_master
daily_chlor <- chlor_master
write_parquet(daily_chlor, 'daily_chlor.parquet')

unique(chlor_master$latitude)

```


# SST Data
```{r}
options(timeout = 600) 

months_to_pull <- seq(as.Date("2004-01-01"), as.Date("2021-12-01"), by = "month")

master_sst_list <- list()
dir.create("temp_sst_downloads", showWarnings = FALSE)

for (i in seq_along(months_to_pull)) {
  
  start_dt <- months_to_pull[i]
  end_dt   <- ceiling_date(start_dt, "month") - days(1)
  
  start_str <- paste0(start_dt, "T12:00:00Z")
  end_str   <- paste0(end_dt, "T12:00:00Z")
  
  message(sprintf("--------\nProcessing: %s to %s", start_dt, end_dt))
  
  # 4. Build the Direct URL for the specific month
  url_raw <- paste0(
    "https://coastwatch.pfeg.noaa.gov/erddap/griddap/ncdcOisst21Agg.nc?",
    "sst[(", start_str, "):1:(", end_str, ")][(0):1:(0)][(18.0):1:(24.0)][(250.0):1:(256.0)]"
  )
  
  # FIX: Mathematically encode the brackets/colons so the NOAA server accepts it
  url_safe <- URLencode(url_raw)
  
  dest_file <- paste0("temp_sst_downloads/oisst_", start_dt, ".nc")
  
  # 5. Download with a Retry Net
  success <- FALSE
  attempt <- 1
  
  while (!success && attempt <= 3) {
    tryCatch({
      # FIX: Added method = "libcurl" which is vastly superior at handling secure .gov sites
      download.file(url_safe, destfile = dest_file, mode = "wb", method = "libcurl", quiet = TRUE)
      success <- TRUE
    }, error = function(e) {
      message(sprintf("   -> Network hiccup on attempt %d. Retrying in 10 seconds...", attempt))
      # FIX: Print the actual system error so we know EXACTLY why it failed
      message(paste("      R System Error:", e$message)) 
      Sys.sleep(10)
      attempt <- attempt + 1
    })
  }
  
  if (!success) stop(paste("CRITICAL: Failed completely on month:", start_dt))
  
  # 6. Extract, keep as daily, and Save to List
  temp_data <- tidync(dest_file) %>%
    hyper_tibble() %>% 
    mutate(
      date = as.Date(as.POSIXct(time, origin = "1970-01-01", tz = "UTC")),
      longitude = as.numeric(longitude),
      longitude = ifelse(longitude > 180, longitude - 360, longitude)
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(sst)) %>%
    # Group directly by date instead of week_start
    group_by(date, latitude, longitude) %>%
    summarize(
      sst = mean(sst, na.rm = TRUE), # Rename directly to sst
      .groups = "drop"
    )
  
  master_sst_list[[as.character(start_dt)]] <- temp_data
  
  # 7. Clean up the massive NetCDF file immediately
  unlink(dest_file)
  rm(temp_data)
  gc()
  
  Sys.sleep(2)
}

# 8. Stitch the list together into a single daily dataframe
daily_sst_master <- bind_rows(master_sst_list)
write_parquet(daily_sst_master, "daily_sst_master.parquet")
```


# SLA Data
```{r}
sla_master <- tidync('sla.nc') %>%
  hyper_tibble() %>%
  filter(!is.na(sla)) %>% 
  mutate(
    date = as.Date(time)
  ) %>%
  group_by(date, latitude, longitude) %>%
  summarize(
    sla = mean(sla, na.rm = TRUE), 
    ugosa = mean(ugosa, na.rm = TRUE),
    vgosa = mean(vgosa, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
sla_master 
write_parquet(daily_sla_master, "daily_sla_master.parquet")
```



# Lat/Long Matching
```{r}
chl_grid <- daily_chlor_master %>% 
  distinct(longitude, latitude) %>% 
  rename(chl_lon = longitude, chl_lat = latitude) %>%
  collect()
sst_grid <- daily_sst_master %>% 
  distinct(longitude, latitude) %>% 
  rename(sst_lon = longitude, sst_lat = latitude) %>%
  collect()
sla_grid <- daily_sla_master %>% 
  distinct(longitude, latitude) %>% 
  rename(sla_lon = longitude, sla_lat = latitude) %>%
  collect()

sf_chl <- st_as_sf(chl_grid, coords = c("chl_lon", "chl_lat"), crs = 4326, remove = FALSE)
sf_sst <- st_as_sf(sst_grid, coords = c("sst_lon", "sst_lat"), crs = 4326, remove = FALSE)
sf_sla <- st_as_sf(sla_grid, coords = c("sla_lon", "sla_lat"), crs = 4326, remove = FALSE)

nearest_sst_index <- st_nearest_feature(sf_chl, sf_sst)
nearest_sla_index <- st_nearest_feature(sf_chl, sf_sla)

spatial_crosswalk <- chl_grid %>%
  mutate(
    matched_sst_lon = sst_grid$sst_lon[nearest_sst_index],
    matched_sst_lat = sst_grid$sst_lat[nearest_sst_index],
    matched_sla_lon = sla_grid$sla_lon[nearest_sla_index],
    matched_sla_lat = sla_grid$sla_lat[nearest_sla_index]
  )

spatial_crosswalk



chl_dates <- daily_chlor_master %>% 
  distinct(date) %>% 
  rename(chl_date = date) %>%
  collect()
sst_dates <- daily_sst_master %>% 
  distinct(date) %>% 
  rename(sst_date = date) %>%
  collect()

temporal_crosswalk <- chl_dates %>%
  left_join(sst_dates, join_by(closest(chl_date > sst_date)))
temporal_crosswalk
```


```{r}
daily_master_dataset <- daily_chlor_master %>%
  left_join(temporal_crosswalk, by = c("date" = "chl_date")) %>%
  left_join(spatial_crosswalk, by = c("longitude" = "chl_lon", "latitude" = "chl_lat")) %>%
  left_join(daily_sst_master, by = c(
    "sst_date" = "date", 
    "matched_sst_lon" = "longitude", 
    "matched_sst_lat" = "latitude"
  )) %>%
  left_join(daily_sla_master, by = c(
    "sst_date" = "date", 
    "matched_sla_lon" = "longitude", 
    "matched_sla_lat" = "latitude"
  )) %>%
  select(-sst_date, -matched_sst_lon, -matched_sst_lat, -matched_sla_lon, -matched_sla_lat) %>%
  collect()

daily_master_dataset <- daily_master_dataset %>%
  mutate(
    year = year(date),
    month = month(date)
  ) %>%
  left_join(oni, by = c('year', 'month')) %>%
  select(-year, -month)

daily_master_dataset <- daily_master_dataset %>%
  group_by(longitude, latitude) %>%
  arrange(date) %>%
  mutate(
    sst_lag1 = lag(sst, n=1),
    sst_lag2 = lag(sst, n=2),
    sla_lag1 = lag(sla, n=1),
    sla_lag2 = lag(sla, n=2),
    oni_lag28 = lag(oni, n=28),
    oni_lag56 = lag(oni, n=56)
  ) %>% ungroup()

daily_master_dataset
write_parquet(daily_master_dataset, 'daily_master_dataset.parquet')

master2 <- master_dataset %>%
  filter(!is.na(oni_lag8))

master2$sst_scaled <- scale(master2$sst)
master2$sla_scaled <- scale(master2$sla)
master2$oni_lag8_scaled <- scale(master2$oni_lag8)
master2 <- master2 %>%
  mutate(pixel_id = as.factor(paste(latitude, longitude, sep = "_")))


write_parquet(master2, 'master2.parquet')
```


# ONI
```{r}
oni <- read.csv('oni.csv')
oni <- oni %>%
  mutate(
    date = as.Date(Date),
    year = year(date),
    month = month(date)
  ) %>% select(year, month, oni)
write.csv(oni, 'oni.csv')
```


# Salinity
```{r}
master_dates <- sort(unique(master2$date))
break_points <- c(master_dates, max(master_dates) + 8)
salinity_master <- tidync('raw_salinity.nc') %>%
  hyper_tibble() %>%
  filter(!is.na(so)) %>% 
  mutate(
    latitude = as.numeric(latitude),
    longitude = as.numeric(longitude),
    raw_date = as.Date(time),
    date_factor = cut(raw_date, 
                      breaks = break_points, 
                      labels = as.character(master_dates), 
                      right = FALSE),
    date = as.Date(date_factor)
  ) %>%
  group_by(date, latitude, longitude) %>%
  summarize(
    so = mean(so, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )


grid_master <- master2 %>% distinct(longitude, latitude) %>% drop_na()
grid_sal    <- salinity_master %>% distinct(longitude, latitude) %>% drop_na()
sf_master <- st_as_sf(grid_master, coords = c("longitude", "latitude"), crs = 4326)
sf_sal    <- st_as_sf(grid_sal, coords = c("longitude", "latitude"), crs = 4326)
nearest_indices <- st_nearest_feature(sf_master, sf_sal)
crosswalk <- grid_master %>%
  mutate(
    sal_lon = grid_sal$longitude[nearest_indices],
    sal_lat = grid_sal$latitude[nearest_indices]
  )

master2 <- master2 %>%
  left_join(crosswalk, by = c("longitude", "latitude")) %>%
  left_join(salinity_master, 
            by = c("date" = "date", 
                   "sal_lon" = "longitude", 
                   "sal_lat" = "latitude")) %>%
  select(-sal_lon, -sal_lat)


master2 <- master2 %>%
  mutate(
    eke_scaled = as.numeric(scale(eke))
  )
```


# SST Spatial Cliff
```{r}
sst_wide <- master2 %>%
  select(longitude, latitude, date, sst) %>%
  
  mutate(
    longitude = as.numeric(as.character(longitude)),
    latitude = as.numeric(as.character(latitude))
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(longitude) & !is.na(latitude)) %>%
  
  group_by(longitude, latitude, date) %>%
  summarize(sst = mean(sst, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = date, values_from = sst)


sst_points <- vect(sst_wide, geom = c("longitude", "latitude"), crs = "EPSG:4326")

perfect_grid <- rast(ext(sst_points), res = 1/24, crs = "EPSG:4326")

sst_raster <- rasterize(sst_points, perfect_grid, field = names(sst_points))

num_layers <- nlyr(sst_raster)

tpi_list <- lapply(1:num_layers, function(i) {
  terrain(sst_raster[[i]], v = "TPI")
})
sst_tpi_raster <- rast(tpi_list)
names(sst_tpi_raster) <- names(sst_raster)


sst_tpi_df <- as.data.frame(sst_tpi_raster, xy = TRUE) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -c(x, y), 
    names_to = "raw_date", 
    values_to = "sst_tpi"
  ) %>%
  rename(longitude = x, latitude = y) %>%
  mutate(
    date = as.Date(gsub("\\.", "-", gsub("^X", "", raw_date))),
    
    sst_tpi_scaled = as.numeric(scale(sst_tpi))
  ) %>%
  select(-raw_date) %>%
  filter(!is.na(sst_tpi))

grid_master <- master2 %>% distinct(longitude, latitude) %>% drop_na()
grid_grad   <- sst_tpi_df %>% distinct(longitude, latitude) %>% drop_na()

sf_master <- st_as_sf(grid_master, coords = c("longitude", "latitude"), crs = 4326)
sf_grad   <- st_as_sf(grid_grad, coords = c("longitude", "latitude"), crs = 4326)

nearest_indices <- st_nearest_feature(sf_master, sf_grad)

crosswalk <- grid_master %>%
  mutate(
    grad_lon = grid_grad$longitude[nearest_indices],
    grad_lat = grid_grad$latitude[nearest_indices]
  )


master2 <- master2 %>%
  select(-any_of(c("sst_gradient", "sst_gradient_scaled", "join_lon", "join_lat", "grad_lon", "grad_lat"))) %>%
  left_join(crosswalk, by = c("longitude", "latitude")) %>%
  left_join(sst_tpi_df, 
            by = c("date" = "date", 
                   "grad_lon" = "longitude", 
                   "grad_lat" = "latitude")) %>%
  select(-grad_lon, -grad_lat)
```
